name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_wru_uvw_asset_audit
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_wru' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_asset_audit' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Modified` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`datekey` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Modified` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`datekey` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Modified|ModifiedUser|DeltaUTC|datekey' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_wru`.`uvw_asset_audit`

error.message:
[INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS] Insufficient privileges:
Table 'uvw_asset_audit' does not have sufficient privilege to execute because the owner of one of the underlying resources failed an authorization check. SQLSTATE: 42501
